name: using-cmux
description: Skill for operating cmux terminal multiplexer. Pane splitting, sub-agent spawning/monitoring/result collection, command sending, screen reading, and notifications.

hooks.command: if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ -z "$CMUX_NO_RENAME_TAB" ]; then REF=$(cmux identify | jq -r '.caller.surface_ref'); NUM=$(echo "$REF" | cut -d: -f2); cmux rename-tab --surface "$REF" "[$NUM] Claude Code"; fi
